case_title: D&M CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPEMENT LLC VS. AALA DERAMBAKHSH

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PARTIES. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT D&M CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPMENT LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RANRAN MOU (LLC MEMBER) VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT/CROSS CLAIMANT AALA DERAMBAKHSH IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT D&M CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPMENT LLC ORALLY STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT/CROSS COMPLAINANT PARTIES INFORM THE COURT THAT PARTIES ARE WORKING ON SETTLEMENT OUTSIDE COURT AND ARE REQUESTING THE COURT TO DISMISS BOTH OF THEIR CLAIMS (PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND DEFENDANT'S CROSSCLAIM) WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PARTIES TO BE REFILED IF PENDING SETTLEMENT OUTSIDE COURT IS NOT REACHED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGEPROTEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-13-2023 SC-120(DEFENDANT'S CLAIM) MAIL TO CROSS DEFENDANT(D&M CONSTRUCTION DEVELOPEMENT LLC)(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
ORDER ON PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED. (R. MOU, MEMBER REPRESENTATIVE) [HEARING: 2-2-23 AT 3:30PM]
